mapper.select: select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, inner_step_seq, inner_step_name, status, execnt, exetime, DATE_FORMAT(exestart, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as exestart, DATE_FORMAT(exeend, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as exeend, message, result from cotdl.tbl_innerstep order by orderid , stepid , seq1 , seq2 , seq3 , inner_step_seq
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_innerstep (orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, inner_step_seq, inner_step_name, status, execnt, exetime, exestart, exeend, message, result) values (#{orderid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inner_step_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inner_step_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{execnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, NOW(), null, #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_innerstep (orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, inner_step_seq, inner_step_name, status, execnt, exetime, exestart, exeend, message, result) values (#{orderid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inner_step_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inner_step_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{execnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, NOW(), null, #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, inner_step_seq, inner_step_name, status, execnt, exetime, DATE_FORMAT(exestart,'%Y/%m/%d') as exestart, DATE_FORMAT(exeend,'%Y/%m/%d') as exeend, message, result from cotdl.tbl_innerstep
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_innerstep set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exestart= NOW(), message= #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE cotdl.tbl_innerstep SET result = CONCAT(COALESCE(result, ''), #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), execnt = COALESCE(execnt, 0) + COALESCE(#{execnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)

update cotdl.tbl_innerstep set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, execnt= #{execnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetime= TIME_FORMAT(TIMEDIFF(now(),exestart),'%H : %i : %s'), exeend= NOW(), message= #{message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result= #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select orderid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, inner_step_seq, inner_step_name, status, execnt, exetime, DATE_FORMAT(exestart, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as exestart, DATE_FORMAT(exeend, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as exeend, message, result from cotdl.tbl_innerstep
order by orderid , stepid , seq1 , seq2 , seq3 , inner_step_seq
select * from cotdl.tbl_innerstep where INNER_STEP_NAME like 'partition%'
select COALESCE(SUM(EXECNT), 0) from cotdl.tbl_innerstep where INNER_STEP_NAME like 'partition%'

SELECT DISTINCT i.orderid, i.stepid, i.seq1, i.seq2, i.seq3 FROM cotdl.tbl_innerstep i WHERE i.inner_step_seq = 10 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM cotdl.tbl_innerstep i2 WHERE i2.orderid = i.orderid AND i2.stepid = i.stepid AND i2.seq1 = i.seq1 AND i2.seq2 = i.seq2 AND i2.seq3 = i.seq3 AND i2.inner_step_seq = 40 AND i2.status = 'Ended OK' )
